title: GTA+
headline: GTA+
subtitle: This Month’s Benefits
content:
In addition to the recurring monthly GTA$500,000 deposited directly into your Maze Bank account, GTA+ Members who've signed up for this month (April 2 - May 6) will also receive:

— The new Bravado Buffalo STX Pursuit (Emergency)
— 50% off Bail Office properties and their Upgrades and Modifications
— The Bigness Crowned Varsity Jacket and Bigness Crowned Wide Pants
— And more

Membership automatically renews monthly, cancel anytime. Visit rsg.ms/gtaplus for more info.
